entities.name: HYPERSPECTRAL REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: A technique using imaging spectroscopy for characterization, monitoring, modeling, and mapping of vegetation and crops

entities.name: VEGETATION
entities.description: Plant life studied using hyperspectral remote sensing

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL CROPS
entities.description: Crops studied using hyperspectral remote sensing

entities.name: GROUND-BASED REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Hyperspectral remote sensing conducted from the ground

entities.name: PLATFORM-MOUNTED REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Hyperspectral remote sensing conducted from a platform

entities.name: AIRBORNE REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Hyperspectral remote sensing conducted from aircraft

entities.name: UAV MOUNTED REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Hyperspectral remote sensing conducted from Unmanned Aerial Vehicles

entities.name: SPACEBORNE REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Hyperspectral remote sensing conducted from space

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL REMOTE SENSING
entities.description: Traditional remote sensing techniques that are less advanced than hyperspectral remote sensing

entities.name: BIOPHYSICAL AND BIOCHEMICAL QUANTITIES
entities.description: Physical and chemical characteristics of vegetation and crops

entities.name: CROP TYPE
entities.description: The specific species or variety of an agricultural crop

entities.name: NITROGEN DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A stress factor in crops characterized by a lack of nitrogen

entities.name: MOISTURE DEFICIENCY
entities.description: A stress factor in crops characterized by a lack of water

entities.name: DROUGHT CONDITIONS
entities.description: Environmental conditions characterized by severe water shortage

entities.name: WATER USE
entities.description: The amount of water consumed by crops

entities.name: WATER PRODUCTIVITIES
entities.description: The efficiency of water use in agricultural crops

entities.name: HUGHES PHENOMENON
entities.description: The curse of dimensionality associated with high-dimensional hyperspectral data

entities.name: DATA REDUNDANCY
entities.description: The presence of overlapping or unnecessary information in hyperspectral bands

entities.name: DATA MINING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Computational methods used to select optimal hyperspectral bands
